contentBlocks.original:
ईश्वर उवाच ।
श‍ृणु देवि प्रवक्ष्यामि कवचं सर्वसिद्धिदम् ।
पठित्वा पाठयित्वा च नरो मुच्येत सङ्कटात् ॥ १ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
īśvara uvāca .
śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi kavacaṃ sarvasiddhidam .
paṭhitvā pāṭhayitvā ca naro mucyeta saṅkaṭāt .. 1 ..
contentBlocks.translation: Ishvara said: Listen, O Goddess — I shall recite this kavacham (protective armour) which grants all accomplishments. By reciting or teaching it, a person is freed from all troubles.
contentBlocks.meanings: ईश्वर (īśvara) – Lord; उवाच (uvāca) – said; श‍ृणु (śṛṇu) – listen; देवि (devi) – O Goddess; प्रवक्ष्यामि (pravakṣyāmi) – I shall speak; कवचं (kavacaṁ) – armor; सर्वसिद्धिदम् (sarvasiddhidam) – granting all success (सर्व:all | सिद्धिदम्:granting success); पठित्वा (paṭhitvā) – having recited; पाठयित्वा (pāṭhayitvā) – having taught; च (ca) – and; नरो (naro) – man; मुच्येत (mucyeta) – would be freed; सङ्कटात् (saṅkaṭāt) – from distress;

contentBlocks.original:
अज्ञात्वा कवचं देवि दुर्गामन्त्रं च यो जपेत् ।
स नाप्नोति फलं तस्य परं च नरकं व्रजेत् ॥ २ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ajñātvā kavacaṃ devi durgāmantraṃ ca yo japet .
sa nāpnoti phalaṃ tasya paraṃ ca narakaṃ vrajet .. 2 ..
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess, one who recites the Durga mantra without knowing this kavacham obtains no fruit from it and indeed goes to a higher kind of hell.
contentBlocks.meanings: अज्ञात्वा (ajñātvā) – without knowing; कवचं (kavacaṁ) – armor; देवि (devi) – O Goddess; दुर्गामन्त्रं (durgāmantraṁ) – Durga mantra (दुर्गा:Durga | मन्त्रं:mantra); च (ca) – and; यो (yaḥ) – who; जपेत् (japet) – chants; स (sa) – he; नाप्नोति (nāpnoti) – does not obtain; फलं (phalaṁ) – fruit; तस्य (tasya) – his; परं (paraṁ) – supreme; च (ca) – and; नरकं (narakaṁ) – hell; व्रजेत् (vrajet) – goes;

contentBlocks.original:
इदं गुह्यतमं देवि कवचं तव कथ्यते ।
गोपनीयं प्रयत्नेन सावधानवधारय ॥ ३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
idaṃ guhyatamaṃ devi kavacaṃ tava kathyate .
gopanīyaṃ prayatnena sāvadhānavadhāraya .. 3 ..
contentBlocks.translation: This most secret kavacham of yours is now being narrated. Guard it carefully and listen with full attention.
contentBlocks.meanings: इदं (idaṁ) – this; गुह्यतमं (guhyatamaṁ) – most secret; देवि (devi) – O Goddess; कवचं (kavacaṁ) – armor; तव (tava) – your; कथ्यते (kathyate) – is told; गोपनीयं (gopanīyaṁ) – to be kept secret; प्रयत्नेन (prayatnena) – with effort; सावधानवधारय (sāvadhānavadhāraya) – attentively comprehend (सावधान:attentive | वधारय:comprehend);

contentBlocks.original:
उमादेवी शिरः पातु ललाटे शूलधारिणी ।
चक्षुषी खेचरी पातु कर्णौ चत्वरवासिनी ॥ ४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
umādevī śiraḥ pātu lalāṭe śūladhāriṇī .
cakṣuṣī khecarī pātu karṇau catvaravāsinī .. 4 ..
contentBlocks.translation: May Uma Devi protect the head; may the trident-holder protect the forehead; may Khachari protect the eyes; may the four-roads-dweller protect the ears.
contentBlocks.meanings: उमादेवी (umādēvī) – Goddess Uma; शिरः (śiraḥ) – head; पातु (pātu) – may protect; ललाटे (lalāṭe) – forehead; शूलधारिणी (śūladhāriṇī) – trident bearer (शूल:trident | धारिणी:bearer); चक्षुषी (cakṣuṣī) – eyes; खेचरी (khecarī) – sky wanderer; पातु (pātu) – may protect; कर्णौ (karṇau) – ears; चत्वरवासिनी (catvaravāsinī) – dweller of crossroads (चत्वर:crossroads | वासिनी:dweller);

contentBlocks.original:
सुगन्धा नासिके पातु वदनं सर्वधारिणी । सर्वसाधिनी
जिह्वां च चण्डिकादेवी ग्रीवां सौभद्रिका तथा ॥ ५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sugandhā nāsike pātu vadanaṃ sarvadhāriṇī . sarvasādhinī
jihvāṃ ca caṇḍikādevī grīvāṃ saubhadrikā tathā .. 5 ..
contentBlocks.translation: May Sugandha (the fragrant one) protect the nose; may the all-supporting one protect the face; may Chandika Devi protect the tongue; may Saubhadrika protect the neck.
contentBlocks.meanings: सुगन्धा (sugandhā) – fragrant; नासिके (nāsike) – nose; पातु (pātu) – may protect; वदनं (vadanaṁ) – face; सर्वधारिणी (sarvadhāriṇī) – supporter of all (सर्व:all | धारिणी:supporter); सर्वसाधिनी (sarvasādhini) – accomplisher of all (सर्व:all | साधिनी:accomplisher); जिह्वां (jihvāṁ) – tongue; च (ca) – and; चण्डिकादेवी (caṇḍikādevī) – Goddess Caṇḍikā (चण्डिका:Caṇḍikā | देवी:goddess); ग्रीवां (grīvāṁ) – neck; सौभद्रिका (saubhadrikā) – Saubhadra's daughter; तथा (tathā) – also;

contentBlocks.original:
अशोकवासिनी चेतो द्वौ बाहू वज्रधारिणी ।
कण्ठं पातु महावाणी जगन्माता स्तनद्वयम् ॥ ६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
aśokavāsinī ceto dvau bāhū vajradhāriṇī .
kaṇṭhaṃ pātu mahāvāṇī jaganmātā stanadvayam .. 6 ..
contentBlocks.translation: May the Ashoka-tree-dweller protect the mind; may the thunderbolt-bearer protect both arms; may Mahavani protect the throat; may Jaganmata (world-mother) protect both breasts.
contentBlocks.meanings: अशोकवासिनी (aśokavāsinī) – residing in Ashoka tree (अशोक:Ashoka tree | वासिनी:residing); चेतो (ceto) – mind; द्वौ (dvau) – two; बाहू (bāhū) – arms; वज्रधारिणी (vajradhāriṇī) – holding a thunderbolt (वज्र:thunderbolt | धारिणी:holding); कण्ठं (kaṇṭhaṁ) – throat; पातु (pātu) – may protect; महावाणी (mahāvāṇī) – great speech (मह:great | वाणी:speech); जगन्माता (jaganmātā) – mother of the world (जगन्:world | माता:mother); स्तनद्वयम् (stanadvayam) – pair of breasts (स्तन:breast | द्वयम्:pair);

contentBlocks.original:
हृदयं ललितादेवी उदरं सिंहवाहिनी ।
कटिं भगवती देवी द्वावूरू विन्ध्यवासिनी ॥ ७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
hṛdayaṃ lalitādevī udaraṃ siṃhavāhinī .
kaṭiṃ bhagavatī devī dvāvūrū vindhyavāsinī .. 7 ..
contentBlocks.translation: May Lalita Devi protect the heart; may the lion-rider protect the abdomen; may Bhagavati protect the waist; may Vindhyavasini protect both thighs.
contentBlocks.meanings: हृदयं (hṛdayaṁ) – heart; ललितादेवी (lalitādevī) – Goddess Lalita (ललिता:Lalita | देवी:goddess); उदरं (udaraṁ) – stomach; सिंहवाहिनी (siṁhavāhinī) – lion-rider (सिंह:lion | वाहिनी:rider); कटिं (kaṭiṁ) – waist; भगवती (bhagavatī) – Goddess; देवी (devī) – goddess; द्वावूरू (dvāvūrū) – two thighs (द्वा:two | ऊरू:thighs); विन्ध्यवासिनी (vindhyavāsinī) – Vindhyavasini (विन्ध्य:Vindhya | वासिनी:dweller);

contentBlocks.original:
महाबला च जङ्घे द्वे पादौ भूतलवासिनी ।
एवं स्थिताऽसि देवि त्वं त्रैलोक्ये रक्षणात्मिका ।
रक्ष मां सर्वगात्रेषु दुर्गे देवि नमोऽस्तुते ॥ ८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahābalā ca jaṅghe dve pādau bhūtalavāsinī .
evaṃ sthitā'si devi tvaṃ trailokye rakṣaṇātmikā .
rakṣa māṃ sarvagātreṣu durge devi namo'stute .. 8 ..
contentBlocks.translation: May the greatly powerful protect both calves; may the earth-dweller protect both feet. Thus, O Goddess, you are established in all three worlds as the protecting force — protect me in all my limbs, O Durga Devi, salutations to you.
contentBlocks.meanings: महाबला (mahābalā) – great strength; च (ca) – and; जङ्घे (jaṅghe) – legs; द्वे (dve) – two; पादौ (pādau) – feet; भूतलवासिनी (bhūtalavāsinī) – dweller on earth (भूतल:earth | वासिनी:dweller); एवं (evaṁ) – thus; स्थिताऽसि (sthitā'si) – you are situated; देवि (devi) – goddess; त्वं (tvaṁ) – you; त्रैलोक्ये (trailokye) – in the three worlds; रक्षणात्मिका (rakṣaṇātmikā) – protector (रक्षण:protection | आत्मिका:essence); रक्ष (rakṣa) – protect; मां (māṁ) – me; सर्वगात्रेषु (sarvagātreṣu) – in all limbs (सर्व:all | गात्रेषु:limbs); दुर्गे (durge) – Durga; देवि (devi) – goddess; नमोऽस्तुते (namo'stute) – salutations to you;

contentBlocks.original:
इत्येतत्कवचं देवि महाविद्या फलप्रद ।
यः पठेत्प्रातरुत्थाय स हि तीर्थफलं लभेत् ॥ ९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ityetatkavacaṃ devi mahāvidyā phalaprada .
yaḥ paṭhetprātarutthāya sa hi tīrthaphalaṃ labhet .. 9 ..
contentBlocks.translation: This kavacham, O Goddess, bestows the fruits of the great knowledge. Whoever reads it upon rising in the morning obtains the merit of pilgrimage to all sacred tirthas.
contentBlocks.meanings: इत्येतत्कवचं (ityetatkavacaṁ) – thus this armor (इति:thus | एतत्:this | कवचं:armor); देवि (devi) – O goddess; महाविद्या (mahāvidyā) – great knowledge (मह:great | विद्या:knowledge); फलप्रद (phalaprada) – fruit-giving (फल:fruit | प्रद:giving); यः (yaḥ) – who; पठेत्प्रातरुत्थाय (paṭhetprātarutthāya) – reads after rising in the morning (पठेत्:reads | प्रातर्:morning | उत्थाय:rising); स (sa) – he; हि (hi) – indeed; तीर्थफलं (tīrthaphalaṁ) – fruit of pilgrimage (तीर्थ:pilgrimage | फलं:fruit); लभेत् (labhet) – obtains;

contentBlocks.original:
यो न्यसेत् कवचं देहे तस्य विघ्नं न क्वचित् ।
भूतप्रेतपिशाचेभ्यो भयं तस्य न विद्यते ॥ १० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yo nyaset kavacaṃ dehe tasya vighnaṃ na kvacit .
bhūtapretapiśācebhyo bhayaṃ tasya na vidyate .. 10 ..
contentBlocks.translation: For one who wears this kavacham on the body, no obstacle will arise anywhere. There will be no fear from ghosts, spirits or demons for such a person.
contentBlocks.meanings: यो (yaḥ) – who; न्यसेत् (nyaset) – places; कवचं (kavacaṁ) – armor; देहे (dehe) – on the body; तस्य (tasya) – his; विघ्नं (vighnaṁ) – obstacle; न (na) – not; क्वचित् (kvacit) – anywhere; भूतप्रेतपिशाचेभ्यो (bhūtapretapiśācebhyo) – from ghosts, spirits, and demons (भूत:ghost | प्रेत:spirit | पिशाच:demon | एभ्यः:from); भयं (bhayaṁ) – fear; तस्य (tasya) – his; न (na) – not; विद्यते (vidyate) – exists;

contentBlocks.translation: Thus the Durga Kavacham from the Sri Kubjika Tantra is complete.
contentBlocks.meanings: इति (iti) – thus; श्रीकुब्जिकातन्त्रे (śrīkubjikātantre) – in the Śrīkubjikā Tantra (श्री:holy | कुब्जिका:Kubjikā | तन्त्रे:in the Tantra); दुर्गाकवचं (durgākavacaṁ) – Durga's armor (दुर्गा:Durga | कवचं:armor); सम्पूर्णम् (sampūrṇam) – complete;
